name: centralcontext-root
description: Shared context and logging hub for AI Agents (ChatGPT, Gemini, Antigravity, OpenClaw, Hermes)

scripts.setup: node scripts/generate-token.js && npm run setup:server && npm run setup:cli && node scripts/init-folders.js
scripts.context:copy: node scripts/context-pack.js | pbcopy && echo 'CentralContext Pack copied to clipboard'
scripts.memory:pipeline: node scripts/memory-distill.js && node scripts/memory-critic.js && node scripts/founder-judge.js && node scripts/memory-consensus.js

author: CentralContext Team
